title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 with Enhanced Reasoning

enriched: true
summary: "OpenAI has announced GPT-5, the latest iteration of its flagship language model, featuring substantially improved reasoning capabilities and a new chain-of-thought architecture. The release marks a significant leap over GPT-4 on standard benchmarks including MMLU, HumanEval, and MATH, with particular gains in multi-step logical deduction. GPT-5 introduces a novel self-verification layer that allows the model to critique and revise its own outputs before responding, reducing hallucination rates by a reported 40%. The model is initially available via API with tiered rate limits, and OpenAI has signalled a phased rollout to ChatGPT subscribers over the coming weeks. Researchers and enterprise partners will gain early access through an expanded preview programme."

  - Phased rollout begins with API access before expanding to ChatGPT

# OpenAI Releases GPT-5 with Enhanced Reasoning

OpenAI has announced GPT-5, the latest iteration of its flagship language model.
